query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`users`.`id` AS `id`,`testdb`.`users`.`name` AS `name`,`testdb`.`users`.`email` AS `email`,`testdb`.`users`.`country` AS `country`,`testdb`.`users`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from `testdb`.`users` where (`testdb`.`users`.`created_at` between '2021-01-01' and '2021-12-31')
operation: Index range scan on users using idx_created over ('2021-01-01' <= created_at <= '2021-12-31'), with index condition: (users.created_at between '2021-01-01' and '2021-12-31')
